title: Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München AI Policy Evidence Draft - 2026-05-12
summary: Staged crawl for Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München found official LMU evidence on IfKW student AI-use rules for assessed work, Medical Faculty dissertation/GWP AI-use responsibilities, and teaching guidance for adapting assessments around ChatGPT. All claims remain non-canonical staged candidates and are not human reviewed.
limitations: This draft is based only on publicly accessible official LMU sources fetched on 2026-05-12; login-gated Moodle or internal material was not accessed.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are not canonical public claims and have not been human reviewed.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
